# AI-Ready Finance Templates for SMEs

> Structured financial templates designed for both human analysts and AI agents. Machine-readable Markdown + JSON Schema format. IFRS/EU-aligned.

## What this repository offers

Three financial templates built for dual use — human reviewers and AI agents — covering the core financial workflows in SME analysis, monitoring, and reporting.

## Templates

### SME Due Diligence Checklist
- 90 items across 9 sections: Corporate/Legal, Financial Statements, Tax, Contracts, Debt, HR, Intellectual Property, Litigation, Operations
- Status enum: PASS / FAIL / PARTIAL / N/A / PENDING
- Risk enum: HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW
- Output: deal recommendation (PROCEED / PROCEED_WITH_CONDITIONS / FURTHER_INVESTIGATION_REQUIRED / DO_NOT_PROCEED)
- Preview: /due-diligence/preview.json
- Full version: https://structuredfinance.gumroad.com
- LangChain Hub: https://smith.langchain.com/hub/structured-finance/sme-due-diligence-checklist

### SME Cash Flow Forecast (12-Month Rolling)
- 40+ line items across 8 sections: Assumptions, Operating Inflows, Operating Outflows, Investing, Financing, Cash Position, Variance Analysis, Alerts
- Buffer status enum: ABOVE_MINIMUM / WARNING / BELOW_MINIMUM
- Alert types: CASH_BELOW_BUFFER (CRITICAL), NEGATIVE_OPERATING_FLOW (WARNING), HIGH_OUTFLOW_RATIO (WARNING)
- Built-in closing balance formula: opening + net_operating + net_investing + net_financing
- Preview: /cash-flow/preview.json
- Full version: https://structuredfinance.gumroad.com
- LangChain Hub: https://smith.langchain.com/hub/structured-finance/sme-cash-flow-forecast-12m

### CFO KPI Dashboard
- 30 KPIs across 5 categories: Profitability (6), Liquidity (7), Growth (6), Efficiency (6), Debt & Solvency (5)
- Direction flag on every KPI: HIGHER_IS_BETTER / LOWER_IS_BETTER (prevents AI misclassification)
- Pre-configured IFRS/EU-aligned thresholds — no setup required
- Status enum: GREEN / AMBER / RED / N/A
- Trend enum: UP / DOWN / STABLE
- Overall scorecard: GREEN (< 3 RED KPIs) / AMBER (3-6 RED) / RED (> 6 RED)
- Alert types: CRITICAL / WARNING / INFO
- Preview: /kpi-dashboard/preview.json
- Full version: https://structuredfinance.gumroad.com
- LangChain Hub: https://smith.langchain.com/hub/structured-finance/cfo-kpi-dashboard-30kpis

## Format

Each template ships in two formats:
- Markdown (.md) — structured, human-readable, board-ready
- JSON Schema Draft-07 (.json) — machine-readable, with enums, thresholds, direction flags, and agent_instructions block

## Compatible frameworks

LangChain · CrewAI · AutoGen · OpenAI Assistants API · Anthropic Tool Use · n8n · Make · Power Automate

## Use cases

- M&A due diligence automation
- Investment screening agents
- Automated treasury monitoring
- Monthly CFO reporting automation
- Portfolio company KPI monitoring
- Board pack generation
- Financial anomaly detection

## Target companies

SMEs with revenue EUR 500K–50M. IFRS/EU-aligned benchmarks.

## License

Preview schemas: MIT
Full templates: Commercial single-entity license via Gumroad
